factions.name: The Avowed of Candlekeep
factions.agenda: Catalogue all knowledge; reveal almost none.

factions.name: The Tomeguard
factions.agenda: Defend the keep. Keep the courtyard quiet.

factions.name: The Academy at Velmis
factions.agenda: Enforce the Naming Accord; recover its exiled students or silence them.

factions.name: The Hollow Choir
factions.agenda: Re-name the dead and bind them in service.
